methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran dominates the threat picture as US strikes on Karaj trigger vows of regional retaliation and diplomatic maneuvering.
bullets: Iran has vowed crushing retaliatory attacks on regional infrastructure after a deadly US strike on a bridge in Karaj.
Ex-FM Zarif stated that Tehran should declare victory and make a deal amid ongoing hostilities.
The UN is set to vote on a watered-down proposal to open the Strait of Hormuz.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian strike trajectories and Strait of Hormuz diplomatic outcomes for immediate regional spillover risks.
